title: We built AimyTrade to stop traders from flying blind
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
AimyTrade is built to make market data understandable. It analyzes live data, sentiment, and technical indicators to explain what’s happening in the market — clearly and without noise.

The goal isn’t to predict, but to clarify. Every ticker shows what factors are influencing price action, how sentiment is shifting, and where attention is moving.

It’s a platform for traders who want to understand the story behind market movement, not just react to it.

If you’ve been using it, share your thoughts on what parts of the data you find most useful.

[Check it out](https://aimytrade.io/)
